_comment: Temporary RustSec exceptions only. Each entry needs an advisory id, a concrete justification, and a review window of at most 90 days. Expired entries fail the policy gate.

ignored.reason: atomic-polyfill is lockfile-only through disabled geo-types compatibility features for rstar 0.9–0.11 and heapless 0.7; even the workspace all-feature target graph does not activate it. The notice reports maintenance status, not a vulnerability.

paste is a compile-time transitive dependency of the optional fastembed/tokenizers stack; the notice reports maintenance status, not a vulnerability, and no compatible upstream replacement is available here.
